description: A ground-level photograph depicting a natural beach and dune landscape. The foreground and midground show extensive sandy areas, typical of dunes, with sparse, low-lying dry vegetation scattered throughout. In the midground, a prominent sand dune is visible, topped with a cluster of green, woody shrubs or small trees. To its left, another smaller dune also features sparse vegetation. The background consists of more undulating sandy terrain under a partly cloudy sky. The image depicts a "Beaches and Dunes" (CLMS class 6.2.1.0) environment, consistent with areas where "trees or shrub should cover <10%". The location is identified as the Doñana Natura 2000 site in Southern Spain.
